name: Message from Space: Galactic Wars
original_name: 宇宙からのメッセージ・銀河大戦
overview: The 15th solar system is invaded by the Stressos. Two men, Ryû and Ayato, and a man-ape, Baru, organize the resistance. They are helped by Eolia, a mysterious woman traveling on a three masted space ship.

trailers.title: 福本清三さん、ヒビト、その２
